title: coleus schizophyllus
intro: Coleus schizophyllus, also known as the "Blue Pimpernel" or "Kunth's Coleus", is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleus schizophyllus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Coleus schizophyllus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
